title: AI Gangster Mugshot
description: Uses the default AI provider to stage a photo as a cinematic crime-drama mugshot.
positive_prompt: Crime drama mugshot, mafia boss appearance, cinematic gangster atmosphere, serious expression, movie-quality police booking photo, height measurement wall, arrest placard, dramatic law enforcement photography, realistic skin texture, highly detailed face, photorealistic, sharp focus
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, CGI, 3D render, blurry, low resolution, distorted face, deformed body, extra fingers, extra limbs, duplicate features, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text overlays, smiling excessively, futuristic background, fantasy elements, pixelated, noise, artifacts
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. noir crime drama, sharp suit...
